scripts.copy-videos: mkdir -p public/videos && cp test-results/admin-daily-Admin-daily-workflow-chromium/video.webm public/videos/admin-daily.webm 2>/dev/null; cp test-results/admin-Admin-walkthrough-chromium/video.webm public/videos/admin.webm 2>/dev/null; cp test-results/cashier-Cashier-walkthrough-chromium/video.webm public/videos/cashier.webm 2>/dev/null; cp test-results/rider-Rider-walkthrough-chromium/video.webm public/videos/rider.webm 2>/dev/null; echo 'Videos copied to public/videos/'
